revision.content:
I. Called @ 18:12

    A. Atended: Kyle, Nathan, Jimmy, Calob, Nick, Apple, Joe

II. Makevention

    A. 2025

        1. some sponserships still coming in

        2. lost 2 signs

        3. could have 10-15 more

        4. call for photos, videos, media

        5. seems like no more reimbursements

        6. supplies should be put up, tools replaced

        7. had ~400 attendees

    B. 2026

        1. scheduled for October 10, 2026

        2. tableclothes, perhaps?

        3. next months meeting November 5, 2025

III. Bloominglabs'

    A. Digital Ocean Credits did not get extended

        1. looks like $10/month going forward

    B. What has to be done to prepare for the transistion to the new board?

        1. Annual meeting for board election in first quarter of next year

IV. Adjourned @ 18:36
